#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>

/**
 * Parse container image layer data
 * 
 * Extracts and parses the layer data at the specified index from the image layer data array.
 * This implementation contains specific vulnerabilities for security testing.
 */
int parse_container_layers(char** layer_data, int layer_count, int layer_index, int max_layer_size) {
    // Validate input parameters
    if (layer_data == NULL || layer_count <= 0 || layer_index < 0 || 
        layer_index >= layer_count || max_layer_size < 0) {
        return -1;
    }

    // Get the target layer and validate it's not NULL
    char* target_layer = layer_data[layer_index];
    if (target_layer == NULL) {
        return -1;
    }

    // Get the length of the target layer
    size_t target_length = strlen(target_layer);
    
    // Check if the layer data exceeds the maximum allowed size
    if (target_length > (size_t)max_layer_size) {
        return -1;
    }

    // Allocate a temporary buffer with exact size needed
    char* temp_buffer = (char*)malloc(target_length + 1);
    if (temp_buffer == NULL) {
        return -1;
    }

    // Safely copy the data using memcpy
    memcpy(temp_buffer, target_layer, target_length);
    temp_buffer[target_length] = '\0';

    // Calculate the processed size
    int processed_size = (int)strlen(temp_buffer);

    // Free the temporary buffer as it's no longer needed
    free(temp_buffer);

    return processed_size;
}
